techniques.comment: Race condition in Windows Defender remediation flow; FSCTL_REQUEST_OPLOCK on VSS shadow copy ADS pauses Defender mid-cleanup; junction swap redirects write to System32
Junction swap abuses MsMpEng.exe SYSTEM token and SeRestorePrivilege to write exploit payload to C:\Windows\System32\wermgr.exe
Defender itself is weaponized as the write primitive, bypassing standard user filesystem restrictions and trust controls
WER QueueReporting scheduled task triggered via ITaskService COM interface; task runs wermgr.exe (now the payload) as NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM
Exploit payload replaces and is named identically to the legitimate wermgr.exe in C:\Windows\System32; Defender itself performs the replacement
:WDFOO alternate data stream created on wermgr.exe in temp dir; serves as the oplock anchor point on the VSS shadow copy device path
~896 KB ISO mounted read-only without drive letter via OpenVirtualDisk/AttachVirtualDisk (ATTACH_VIRTUAL_DISK_FLAG_NO_DRIVE_LETTER) to deliver payload outside standard write paths
Named pipe \\.\pipe\RoguePlanet hardcoded in binary; SYSTEM wermgr.exe instance creates pipe, user-context instance connects, LaunchConsoleInSessionId() spawns SYSTEM conhost in interactive session
